en-US.title: IgniteKit
en-US.description:
IgniteKit is a powerful toolkit by Educators Labs designed to help developers and teams build, configure, and launch high-quality mobile apps faster.

With a clean setup experience and flexible environment configuration, IgniteKit gives you everything you need to go from idea to production with confidence.

Features:
• Environment-aware configuration
• Clean and minimal interface
• Built for speed and reliability
